# Wave 2 Auto-Agent Meta Prompt

Use `AGENTS.md` together with `WAVE-2-AGENT-WORKFLOW.md` and `WAVE-2-PARALLEL-CLOSEOUT-PLAN.md` before delegating or executing closeout work.

## Required Coordination Notes

- Refresh shared memory with `scripts/drift-fix-memory.mjs` when scope or status shifts.
- Call out any new MCP tool, new hook or policy file, or any attempt to lean on a later-wave agent.
- Report files changed, tests run, blockers, and the next recommended task ID in every closeout handoff.
